name: Witchcrafter Unit Appeler
desc:
2 Spellcaster monsters with different Attributes
Once per turn, if you would discard a Spell Card(s) to activate the effect of another "Witchcrafter" monster you control, you can send that many "Witchcrafter" Spell Cards from your Deck to the GY instead.
Once per turn: You can discard 1 Spell Card; Special Summon 1 "Witchcrafter" monster from your Deck, but it cannot be used as Link Material.
You can only Special Summon "Witchcrafter Unit Appeler" once per turn.
